name: RUST-EATEN FATE

abilities.name: Chosen Ability
abilities.text: During the start phase of turn 1, this crew's leader chooses (fortitude), (warding), or (unusual_defense) abilities.

abilities.name: A Familiar Ending
abilities.text: Once per activation. While resolving an action, this model may ignore abilities of the type chosen on turn 1.

actions.name: Written In Lead
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Non-master enemy only.
actions.effects: This model may declare an action printed on the target's stat card.

triggers.name: Dust May Rise
triggers.text: Summon an Abomination in base contact with the target.

extraction_notes: The crew card shows special abilities chosen at start of turn 1 involving defensive ability types
A Familiar Ending allows ignoring the type of ability chosen on turn 1
Written In Lead is a unique tactical action that allows copying enemy actions
